description_en: The zelkova tree of Kaemonchō is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1977-03-17. It is located at Kaemonchō, Tochigi City.

The ginkgo tree of Tamuramachi is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1998-07-24. It is located at Tamuramachi, Tochigi City.

The hiba cypress of Daiōji Temple is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2000-06-19. It is located at Hoshinomachi, Tochigi City.

The chinquapin tree (shii) is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1978-03-01. It is located at Ōhiramachi Tomita, Tochigi City.

The kaya (Japanese nutmeg tree) is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1978-03-01. It is located at Ōhiramachi Hakuchū, Tochigi City.

The gumi (silverberry tree) is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1991-11-12. It is located at Ōhiramachi Nishiyamada, Tochigi City.

The Chinese tallow tree (nankinhaze) is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1982-01-11. It is located at Tsugamachi Kanaka, Tochigi City.

The weeping cherry tree (shidarezakura) is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1982-01-11. It is located at Tsugamachi Ōgaki, Tochigi City.

The kōyamaki (Japanese umbrella pine) is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1992-11-03. It is located at Tsugamachi Usukubo, Tochigi City.

The mukuroji (soapberry tree) is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1995-08-24. It is located at Tsugamachi Kanaka, Tochigi City.

The Japanese honey locust tree (saikachi) is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1981-03-05. It is located at Nishikatamachi Honjō, Tochigi City.

The zelkova tree of Magami is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1984-12-24. It is located at Nishikatamachi Manako, Tochigi City.

The weeping cherry tree (shidarezakura) is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1987-07-09. It is located at Nishikatamachi Moto, Tochigi City.

The great ginkgo of Tōunji Temple is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1993-02-01. It is located at Nishikatamachi Manako, Tochigi City.

The sacred grove (shasō) of Murahi Shrine is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1972-04-01. It is located at Iwafunemachi Onodera, Tochigi City.

The Japanese cedar tree (sugi) is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2015-03-23. It is located at Ōhiramachi Nishiyamada, Tochigi City.

The maple tree (kaede) is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2015-03-23. It is located at Ōhiramachi Nishiyamada, Tochigi City.
